Previously second-up ran on from midfield; 3rd of 11 at this track on January 1 over 1600m, 0.8 len behind Valentine Gift with 56kg at $4.40. Don't underestimate.

runners.name: MY SYDNEY
runners.comment: Second-up. Comes off a 53-day let-up. First-up after three months 16th of 18 at Kyoto on May 16 over 1400m, 10 len behind Kishar with 53.0kg at $17.90. Previously second-up 11th of 14 at Hanshin on February 28 over 1800m, 21 len behind Realize Luminous carrying 52.0kg at $67.30. Solid top-three hope.

runners.name: BONCELLENSIS
runners.comment: Form hard to fault. Most recently made some head-way from midfield; 3rd of 11 at this track on June 16 over 1500m, 1.3 len behind Lupo with 56kg at $21. The start before that made some head-way from midfield; 2nd of 14 at this track on May 13 over 1500m, 3 len behind Canal Gale carrying 56kg at $74.50. Strong winning hope.

runners.name: SANEI TARO
runners.comment: Second run back. First-up after three months 3rd of 8 at Urawa on June 24 over 1500m, 2.25 len behind Tough Call with 57kg at $15.50. Previously second-up 9th of 11 at this track on January 1 over 1600m, 7 len behind Valentine Gift with 56kg at $18.80. Improver with winning prospects.

runners.name: CANAL REINA
runners.comment: At the latest run 5th of 11 at this track on June 16 over 1500m, 7 len behind Lupo with 54kg at $42.30. The run before that 5th of 12 at this track on May 12 over 1400m, 4 len behind Cardamom Roll with 54kg at $58.80. Prefer to watch at this stage.

runners.name: PURE CHROME
runners.comment: Third-up today. Resumes off a 38 day letup. First-up 6th of 16 at Nakayama Dirt on April 19 over 1200m, 8 len behind Sonic Breaker with 57.0kg at $122.20. runners.name: KAMIKAKUSHI
runners.comment: Third race start. First start 9th of 16 at Chukyo Dirt on March 29 over 1400m, 13 len behind Lever Du Soleil with 55.0kg at $112.50. Returned from break 11th of 16 at Tokyo Dirt on June 6 over 1400m, 14 len behind Raise Tempest carrying 55.0kg at $21.20. Should progress from that first-up run.

runners.name: FOR MY DEAR
runners.comment: Most recently 6th of 8 at this track on June 17 over 1500m, 10 len behind Canal Gale carrying 54kg at $74.80. The run before that 6th of 11 at Funabashi on June 1 over 1200m, 6 len behind Salire Cima carrying 55kg at $10.70. Will need to improve many lengths to feature.

runners.name: AWAKE THIRD
runners.comment: Third-up today. First-up 5th of 11 at Urawa on May 28 over 2000m, 13 len behind Esprit Akirasan carrying 56kg at $27. Last start got back early 6th of 8 at Urawa on June 22 over 2000m, 6 len behind Sadamu Mont Blanc carrying 57kg at $30.20. Draws the inside but looks tested.

GOLDSTAR GRACE can find the frame without surprising.

runners.comment: Last start finished last over 390m at this track beaten 8 lengths (22.61) behind Ace Diva in a Grade 4/5 on July 3. Last couple have been below par. Deserves another chance.

runners.name: DRINK MOJITOS
runners.comment: Has been out of the money of late. Could only manage fifth last time out over 352m at this track. Likely to find this a bit tough.

runners.comment: Has finished sixth at her last couple of starts, most recently at this track over 352m. Solid claims this line-up.

Better than last start and deserves another chance.

runners.name: ROCK IT BABY

runners.name: BART BENTLEY
runners.comment: Last start was driven from back in the field when 6th (Fr5) over 1780m after being wide early at this track beaten 11 m by Bolzano (2:10.40) in 3yo+ on July 1 at $10. G:TRE:10:2026-07-08.comment: 8. MY DINOSAUR was big odds last time but gave a huge sight after a fast early split, grabbed late but holding on to a placing when a 6 length second (17.58) over 300m at this track. Has performed well from this box with a win and two minor placings to his name from four starts. Sure to be about the mark. 4. TAP OUT GRACIE has mixed form recently, finishing eighth (18.57) in a Grade 5 at this track latest but did run well two back when in the frame. Well placed here and can atone this time. 2. MUSTANG SALLY is worth forgiving for her last effort when fifth (17.77) at this track over 300m. Comes through a solid form race last start. Has ability and a bold showing is expected. 7. LACEY RED warrants respect with the drop in trip.

runners.name: MY DINOSAUR
runners.comment: Hit the frame latest (17.58) when second at this track in a Grade 5. Goes very well from the draw boasting one victory and two places from four starts. With a clean break looks hard to beat.

runners.name: MUSTANG SALLY
runners.comment: Last start finished 5th in a Grade 5 on June 24 over 300m at this track behind My Julia beaten 4.5 lengths (17.77). Rates highly and looks tough to beat.

runners.name: SUPER SKUNK
runners.comment: Has finished fourth at this circuit at the last two appearances, most recently when beaten 7 lengths behind In Your Head over 300m. Has claims on best form.

runners.name: LACEY RED
runners.comment: Last start finished fourth in a Grade 5 on July 4 over 400m at The Gardens behind Modest Man, beaten 12 lengths (23.61). Will find this a little easier. Looks a solid contender.

runners.name: TAP OUT GRACIE
runners.comment: Latest effort finished last in a Grade 5 on June 27 over 300m at this track behind My Dinosaur beaten 16 lengths (18.57). Tipped to improve sharply. Rates highly on best form.

runners.name: TRALEE TINY
runners.comment: Was out of the placings last time but the start prior finished in the minors when third (17.96) over 300m at this track. Draws an inside box and is among the better hopes.

runners.name: BLUE WIGGLE
runners.comment: Hasn't shown anything recently, all starting at big odds. Cannot enthuse on this occasion.

runners.name: GOT A SECRET
runners.comment: Has not shown much in recent runs. Could only manage eighth last time out over 300m at this track. Prefer to watch at this stage.

runners.name: PIZZA THIEF
runners.comment: Returns from a 12 weeks spell after being tipped out on the back of a seventh (31.13) over 520m at Nowra. Others are better placed.

runners.comment: Last start finished fourth on July 4 over 400m at Geelong behind Paw Ingrid, beaten 6 lengths (23.31) in a Grade 5. Looks a solid hope.

runners.comment: Last start finished seventh on July 6 over 390m at Warrnambool behind Paw Enna, beaten 6 lengths (22.93) in a Bottom Up - Grade 5. Others read better.

runners.comment: Good performance to win by 3 lengths at this track over 425m (24.50) beating Dernancourt in Bottom Up - Grade 5 on July 1. Has hit winning form and can go on with it.

runners.comment: Has not shown much in recent runs. Could only manage seventh last time out over 425m at this track. Will need to improve to feature.

runners.name: KOBASHIRIDESU

runners.comment: Has been out of the money of late. Could only manage sixth last time out over 352m at this track. Hard to envisage a win.

Hard to knock winning form and with even luck can land the hat trick. 10. SMOOTH BUCKAROO has been racing well, filling a top-three position at his last five starts here including a win from this row. Came from this barrier to miss narrowly last week. Big chance to atone. 7. JUST KEEP CHIMING is a progressive filly who has yet to miss the top-three including a tough last-start win by 1.4 metres at this circuit and distance after racing three wide without cover. 4. WOKKA ROCK hasn't been far away from wider draws at his last couple. Go well.

runners.name: COWBOY CULTURE
runners.comment: Three-year-old colt is racing in fine form. Won his last two outings at this track both over 1730m. runners.name: SMOOTH BUCKAROO

runners.name: DRINK MOJITOS
runners.comment: Has been out of the money of late. Could only manage fifth last time out over 352m at this track. Likely to find this a bit tough.

runners.name: GOLDSTAR GRACE
runners.comment: At the last outing finished 4th over 300m at Q Straight beaten 3.5 lengths (17.05) behind Cake Is Yummy in a P5 on July 6. Looks a solid hope.

runners.name: TUTA SUN
runners.comment: Was out of placings last time (20.40) at this track in a Grade 5, finishing seventh and beaten 5.5 lengths. Yet to win but has placed three times from this draw. Looking to others.

runners.name: BELLA LUNA
runners.comment: Has finished sixth at her last couple of starts, most recently at this track over 352m. Solid claims this line-up.

H:RED:2:2026-07-08.comment: 1. PLAYFUL MISS finished fourth last time out, beaten 6 metres, in a nice return to form at this track over 1780m. SHEREACTS won at this venue two runs ago before a less impressive effort at her latest appearance over 1660m at Albion Park, beaten 20 metres. Primary contender if anywhere near her best. 2. LENNY LINCOLN is better than his last-start eighth over 1780m here. Can bounce back from the favourable draw. 6. ZAC DANIELS cannot be left out after solid recent performances, the latest a sound fourth at Albion Park over 1660m. One for the multiples.

Raced better the start before that where she won by 1.75 m as favourite (Sr3) at this track (2:09.80) beating Heza Maywyn in 3yo+ on June 12 at $3.20. Better than last start and deserves another chance.

runners.name: PLAYFUL MISS
runners.comment: Last start 4th (Sr3) over 1780m at this track beaten 6 m by Bolzano (2:10.40) in 3yo+ on July 1 at $10. runners.name: ROCK IT BABY

At his previous start 4th (Sr2) over 1780m after being wide early at this track, beaten 5 m by Jaccka Cooper (2:09.60) in 3yo+ on June 17 at $31. Has ability and can do much better.

runners.name: BART BENTLEY
runners.comment: Last start was driven from back in the field when 6th (Fr5) over 1780m after being wide early at this track beaten 11 m by Bolzano (2:10.40) in 3yo+ on July 1 at $10. Two runs back 9th (Fr2) over 1780m at this track, beaten 30 m by Sir Richard Lee (2:07.60) on November 12 at $31. Strips fitter and can improve enough to play a big role.

runners.name: CAPTAIN FOXTROT
runners.comment: Last start was well back in the run when 5th (Fr6) over 1780m at this track, beaten 9 m by Playful Miss (2:10.00) in 3yo+ on June 17 at $17. G:TRE:10:2026-07-08.comment: 8. MY DINOSAUR was big odds last time but gave a huge sight after a fast early split, grabbed late but holding on to a placing when a 6 length second (17.58) over 300m at this track. Has performed well from this box with a win and two minor placings to his name from four starts. Sure to be about the mark. 4. TAP OUT GRACIE has mixed form recently, finishing eighth (18.57) in a Grade 5 at this track latest but did run well two back when in the frame. Well placed here and can atone this time. 2. MUSTANG SALLY is worth forgiving for her last effort when fifth (17.77) at this track over 300m. Comes through a solid form race last start. Has ability and a bold showing is expected. 7. LACEY RED warrants respect with the drop in trip.

runners.name: MY DINOSAUR
runners.comment: Hit the frame latest (17.58) when second at this track in a Grade 5. Goes very well from the draw boasting one victory and two places from four starts. With a clean break looks hard to beat.

runners.name: MUSTANG SALLY
runners.comment: Last start finished 5th in a Grade 5 on June 24 over 300m at this track behind My Julia beaten 4.5 lengths (17.77). Rates highly and looks tough to beat.

runners.name: SUPER SKUNK
runners.comment: Has finished fourth at this circuit at the last two appearances, most recently when beaten 7 lengths behind In Your Head over 300m. Has claims on best form.

runners.name: LACEY RED
runners.comment: Last start finished fourth in a Grade 5 on July 4 over 400m at The Gardens behind Modest Man, beaten 12 lengths (23.61). Will find this a little easier. Looks a solid contender.

runners.name: TAP OUT GRACIE
runners.comment: Latest effort finished last in a Grade 5 on June 27 over 300m at this track behind My Dinosaur beaten 16 lengths (18.57). Tipped to improve sharply. Rates highly on best form.

runners.name: TRALEE TINY
runners.comment: Was out of the placings last time but the start prior finished in the minors when third (17.96) over 300m at this track. Draws an inside box and is among the better hopes.

runners.name: BLUE WIGGLE
runners.comment: Hasn't shown anything recently, all starting at big odds. Cannot enthuse on this occasion.

runners.name: GOT A SECRET
runners.comment: Has not shown much in recent runs. Could only manage eighth last time out over 300m at this track. Prefer to watch at this stage.

runners.name: BIG CUTIE
runners.comment: Backs up after finishing 7th on July 4 over 300m at this track in a Grade 4. Can't recommend in this field.

runners.name: PIZZA THIEF
runners.comment: Returns from a 12 weeks spell after being tipped out on the back of a seventh (31.13) over 520m at Nowra. Others are better placed.

G:BEX:1:2026-07-08.comment: 1. CHAIN DRIVE has some solid form under his belt and proved too strong last time to win by 3 lengths at this track in a handy 24.50 beating Dernancourt. Has hit winning form and can measure up again. 2. SUPER SEALANT stuck on well last time to finish half a length back in second (20.09) at Healesville in a Grade 5 over 350m. Expected to be in the finish again. 5. TIPSY TURTLE turned in a plain performance last time when eighth at Healesville over 300m behind Path To Nirvana (17.31) in a Grade 5. Was in the money prior to that. Strong form has emerged from his last run. Expected to feature in the finish. 7. HELLO COOPER was out of the money at this circuit last start but can bounce back.

runners.name: HELLO COOPER
runners.comment: Was out of placings last time (25.01) at this track in a Bottom Up - Grade 5, finishing sixth and beaten 10 lengths. Still a maiden from the draw but has placed seven times. Looks one of the chances.

runners.name: JOHN BOY
runners.comment: Last start finished fourth on July 4 over 400m at Geelong behind Paw Ingrid, beaten 6 lengths (23.31) in a Grade 5. Looks a solid hope.

runners.name: LIKE A BLAZE
runners.comment: Last start finished seventh on July 6 over 390m at Warrnambool behind Paw Enna, beaten 6 lengths (22.93) in a Bottom Up - Grade 5. Others read better.

runners.name: CHAIN DRIVE
runners.comment: Good performance to win by 3 lengths at this track over 425m (24.50) beating Dernancourt in Bottom Up - Grade 5 on July 1. Has hit winning form and can go on with it.

runners.name: BEAST POWER
runners.comment: Has not shown much in recent runs. Could only manage seventh last time out over 425m at this track. Will need to improve to feature.

runners.name: SUPER SEALANT
runners.comment: Showed good improvement when second behind Jazz Hands at Healesville last start over 350m (20.09). Likely to play a major role.

runners.name: ATOMIC DIVA
runners.comment: At the last outing finished 4th on July 1 over 425m at this track behind Chain Drive beaten 8 lengths (25.06) in a Bottom Up - Grade 5. Rates among the chances this time.

runners.name: TIPSY TURTLE
runners.comment: Was out of placings last time (17.31) at Healesville in a Grade 5, finishing eighth and beaten 7 lengths. Has four placings from six starts from the draw. With a clean break looks hard to beat.

R:MBS:6:2026-07-08.comment: 1. FUTO FUKUTSU is a filly by Mind Your Biscuits from the stakes-winner Sigrun on debut. Profiles nicely for this and bold showing expected. 7. T O BERRY is a two-year-old filly by Chrysoberyl out of T O Blueberry stepping out on debut for the Junji Tanaka stable. Bold showing expected. Watch betting. 8. AFLEET LYDIA is facing the starter for the first time. By Maximum Security and hails from the Hiroto Kawashima stable. Watch for a betting push. 3. AS FEET is on debut. By Satono Crown and is out of the Kazuhisa Yamada stable. Pay to watch for any positive betting moves.

runners.name: BABY GANG
runners.comment: First-starter by Espoir City out of Glorious Chimera. Prefer to see her at the races before recommending.

runners.name: FUTO FUKUTSU
runners.comment: Two-year-old filly by Mind Your Biscuits out of Sigrun having her first start. A bold showing is likely.

runners.name: T O BERRY
runners.comment: First-starter by Chrysoberyl out of T O Blueberry. Likely to be the medium of solid backing.

runners.name: PIKANCHI CHERRY
runners.comment: First-starter by Mischevious Alex out of Swan Song. Betting the best guide.

runners.name: AFLEET LYDIA
runners.comment: First-starter by Maximum Security out of Afleet Alexsis. Expected to have ability.

runners.name: AS FEET

runners.name: KAZOKUNO AI
runners.comment: First-starter by Isla Bonita out of Atrevido. Betting the best guide.

runners.name: KOBASHIRIDESU
runners.comment: Two-year-old filly by Shanghai Bobby out of Malibu Beach having her first start. Profiles nicely for this.

H:KIL:3:2026-07-08.comment: 3. QUEEN KIZEN looks close to a win after string of placings. Came from this barrier for second at Melton two starts back then had a 20m handicap at her latest appearance at Maryborough but worked to the front and then stuck on, beaten 3.7 metres into third. Draws for a nice run and could break through. 8. ALDEBARAN SUSANNE has switched yards since galloping out when resuming at Menangle. No harm in drawing here with the sprint lane to rely upon. Has the ability if she gets it right. 4. OFF YOUR FACESKI backs up off a sixth at Melton on Saturday. Led from only spot lower than this when scoring easily at Geelong prior. Contender. 1. MAJESTIC TOOTH owns a good record at this circuit and should get her chance from the ace draw.

runners.name: QUEEN KIZEN
runners.comment: Two back was beaten by 9 m finishing second after a quick start, behind Nakedtruth at Melton over 2240m on June 12 at $4.40. Then a handy effort when beaten by 3.5 m finishing third behind Fremarks Peggy at Maryborough over 2190m on June 29 at $5.50. Deserves a win and gets her chance from this draw.

runners.name: OFF YOUR FACESKI
runners.comment: Backs up 4 days after failing to impress last start; 6th (Fr1) over 2240m at Melton, at the bell was 2nd-1.07 beaten 8 m by Howdy Mate (2:48.20) on July 4 at $12. Drawn well and can make an impact.

runners.name: ALDEBARAN SUSANNE
runners.comment: Galloped out first-up beaten 30 m ninth behind Titan Stride at Menangle over 1609m in a on June 16. Fitter and is a major player with manners.

runners.name: DELS DESTINY
runners.comment: Last start 4th (Sr2) over 1720m at Melton beaten 6 m by Hillwinsome (2:07.80) on June 26 at $11. Before that, 5th (Fr1) over 2240m at Melton, beaten 9 m by Artigas (2:47.60) on June 20 at $51. Good showing expected.

runners.name: TRIPOD
runners.comment: Didn't do much at the last run, 11th (Fr3) over 2240m at Melton beaten 20 m by Howdy Mate (2:48.20) on July 4 at $151. Before that 12th (Sr1) over 2150m at Bendigo beaten 30 m by Rocky Valley (2:37.00) on June 24 at $101. Unlikely to threaten.

runners.name: BULLAPARK BENO
runners.comment: Didn't do much last time out, 6th (Fr2) over 2150m at Bendigo, beaten 25 m by Kyvalley Michael (2:39.20) on July 1 at $7.50. Before that was well back in the run when 7th (Fr5) over 2240m at Melton beaten 45 m by With Aplomb (2:46.70) on June 20 at $81.

R:BEL:7:2026-07-08.comment: 3. PARTAY after having placed second two runs back when fresh-up from a spell scored an easy all-the-way win as the warm favourite last time over 1400m at Pinjarra Scarpside. Has William Pike again in the saddle and will be well supported to go back-to-back. 4. SHIMONOSEKI came from 11th of 12 into the turn to score by a nose over 1600m at Northam last time out, Shaun O'Donnell who has two wins when partnering stays on. Well placed and jumping from a handy draw should be in the finish. 1. ROMANTIC RULER just missed last time out when finishing a close fourth of 11 over 1400m at this track after he raced on the speed into the turn. Racing over 300m more in distance should be fighting out the finish. 2. SHOWLAS is better than her last start run when finishing sixth of seven over 1200m would suggest. Include in combinations.

runners.name: PARTAY
runners.comment: Third-up today. Resuming settled towards the rear 2nd of 12 at this track Mdn on June 10 over 1300m, on a slow track; head behind Western Jet carrying 58kg at $3.60. Second-up favourite; won by 5 len at Pinjarra Scarpside Mdn June 24 over 1400m defeating Rocking In Vegas carrying 58kg at $1.75. Form out of his last win has been franked and he can go on with the job.

Most recently favourite; was well back until straightening; raced back then made ground from the turn; won by a nose at Northam Cl3 June 25 over 1600m defeating Old Mate Henry with 56.5kg at $2.90. The run before that made ground from midfield; 3rd of 12 at this track 0Mwly on June 10 over 1700m, 6 len behind Tiff's Lad carrying 55kg at $3.20. The race before that 5th of 10 at this track Cl3 on June 10 over 1400m, 1.75 len behind Ton Of Grunt with 60kg at $9. Won't be far away.

runners.comment: Most recently 5th of 11 at Pinjarra Cl3 on July 2 over 1400m, on a slow track; 1.1 len behind Bannered with 56kg at $6.50. runners.name: BE MY BELLE

runners.name: DANDY'S GEM

runners.name: CHEETO

runners.name: SURF POINT
runners.comment: Second run back. First-up after 16 months got back early 9th of 12 at this track Cl3 on June 3 over 1400m, slow going 3 len behind Talkaway with 54kg at $201. G:QLE:11:2026-07-08.comment: 3. VELOCITY COMMIT has good early dash but last time was shuffled out the back and missed the frame, finishing seventh (20.27) in a Grade 4/5 at this track. SWEET LEGS turned in a better run last time to find a minor placing (16.81) at Q Straight behind Zabdon No Doubt in a Grade 5. Hard to beat again. 2. NO COVER wasn't far away at the finish when 5th and beaten only 4.5 lengths (20.19) at this track. Worth another chance. 7. SOLAR FLARE is worth including after a top-three finish most recently.

runners.comment: Latest effort finished 5th over 352m at this track beaten 4.5 lengths (20.19) behind Golden Legs in a P5 on June 24. Looks well placed and should prove hard to beat.

runners.name: SOLAR FLARE
runners.comment: Flew the lids with a fast early split last time, hitting the frame with a 2 length third (19.81) over 352m at this track and making it two placings on end. Capable of a good showing.

runners.name: GOLDSTAR CHANEL
runners.comment: Was out of placings last time (20.30) at this track in a Grade 5, finishing seventh and beaten 9 lengths. Yet to win but has placed three times from this draw. Has ability and should be around the money.

runners.name: VELOCITY COMMIT
runners.comment: Latest effort finished 7th in a Grade 4/5 on July 1 over 352m at this track behind Whispering Mist beaten 9 lengths (20.27). Better than the last couple of runs suggest. Expected to do much better.

runners.name: IT'S AN ACE
runners.comment: Could only manage sixth last time but the start prior hit the frame when second (19.22) over 350m at Q Straight. Has a wide draw to navigate but is worth plenty of thought.

runners.name: WISE RICO
runners.comment: Has been out of the money of late. Could only manage sixth last time out over 352m at this track. Hard to envisage a win.

H:BAT:4:2026-07-08.comment: 11. COWBOY CULTURE made it two in a row at this circuit and distance when he came from a similar draw and got the cash by 2.5 metres last time out. Hard to knock winning form and with even luck can land the hat trick. 10. SMOOTH BUCKAROO has been racing well, filling a top-three position at his last five starts here including a win from this row. Came from this barrier to miss narrowly last week. Big chance to atone. 7. JUST KEEP CHIMING is a progressive filly who has yet to miss the top-three including a tough last-start win by 1.4 metres at this circuit and distance after racing three wide without cover. 4. WOKKA ROCK hasn't been far away from wider draws at his last couple. Go well.

runners.name: COWBOY CULTURE
runners.comment: Three-year-old colt is racing in fine form. Won his last two outings at this track both over 1730m. Last start came from midfield and won by 2.25 m (Sr2) at this track (2:05.90) beating Smooth Buckaroo in 3yo on June 24 at $3.60 at the bell was 2nd-2.61. Big chance to land the hat trick.

runners.name: SMOOTH BUCKAROO
runners.comment: Not far away at the last couple starts; Finished a narrow second behind Studleigh Fury at this track over 1730m 3yo GH last start. Before that was beaten 2.25 metres second again at this track in 3yo on June 24. Can continue the strong form.

runners.name: WIT WICKEE
runners.comment: Finished up last campaign with a win at Parkes, started this campaign was well back in the run when 7th (Fr7) over 1730m after racing wide at this track, at the bell was 8th-13.06 beaten 13 m by Cowboy Culture (2:05.90) in 3yo on June 24 at $8.50. Then last time 5th (Fr6) over 1730m after showing early pace at this track, at the bell was 2nd-1.81 beaten 12 m by Studleigh Fury (2:03.90) in 3yo GH on July 1 at $12. Drawn close to the inside and will be fitter so consider.

runners.name: WOKKA ROCK
runners.comment: Last start 4th (Fr5) over 1730m after showing early pace at this track, at the bell was leading 1.81 beaten 9 m by Studleigh Fury (2:03.90) in 3yo GH on July 1 at $4.20. Forward performance expected.

Two runs back 5th (Fr5) over 1730m at this track was 7th-12.42 at the bell, beaten 6 m by Just Keep Chiming (2:06.70) in 3yo on June 24 at $3.50. Long win drought set to continue.

runners.name: SYDS JOY

runners.comment: Last start tracked on the speed and boxed on steadily; won by a neck as favourite after showing early speed, (Fr1) at this track (2:05.50) beating Stay Lucky in M on July 1 at $2.70 at the bell was 3rd-5.38. Tougher task here.

runners.name: HEARTOF KINGSCLAIR
runners.comment: Well beaten last start by Cheval Tiger, who she meets again; when 20 metres tenth at this track over 1730m in a M race on July 1. Will need improvement to figure.

runners.name: STAY LUCKY

Two runs back won by 1.2 m as favourite when quickly away, (Fr2) at Parkes (2:01.90) beating My Ultimate Bruno in on June 21 at $2.10 at the bell was leading 1.2. Decent effort last start. First four chance again.

R:KAW:6:2026-07-08.comment: 4. GRAND WORLD was prominent on straightening then faded to finish eighth last time out over 1900m at Kyoto Dirt. Meets an inferior line-up and is the one to beat. 8. SANEI TARO doesn't win out of turn but ran a strong race when resuming from a spell last time out over 1500m at Urawa, finishing third and beaten 2.25 lengths after being in the firing line on the turn. Well placed and there is no reason he cannot find winning ways. 9. BONCELLENSIS has been racing well and is close to a win, the latest effort a solid third at this track over 1500m. Niihara Shuma has registered two minor placings when on board. One of the contenders. 3. PURE CHROME has been safely held at his last two starts, the latest when ninth over 1400m at Tokyo Dirt. Does enjoy some weight relief this time. Out of his depth in JRA meets recently but can easily bounce back.

runners.name: GRAND WORLD
runners.comment: Comes off a 38 day let-up. Last start couldn't go on with it; 8th of 16 at Kyoto Dirt on May 31 over 1900m, 8 len behind Snark Sharaku with 55.0kg at $3.60. The race before that held ground to the line 2nd of 13 at Kyoto Dirt on May 24 over 1900m, 1.0 len behind Piena Black carrying 55.0kg at $2.60. Leading contender coming out of a very nice stall.

runners.name: KASTANIE
runners.comment: Comes off a 38 day let-up. Last start 8th of 16 at Tokyo Dirt on May 31 over 1600m, 9 len behind Efcharisto with 55.0kg at $235.20. The run before that 10th of 16 at Nakayama Dirt on April 11 over 1800m, 22 len behind Ascot Vert carrying 52.0kg at $125.30. Will be doing best work late.

Previously second-up ran on from midfield; 3rd of 11 at this track on January 1 over 1600m, 0.8 len behind Valentine Gift with 56kg at $4.40. Don't underestimate.

runners.name: MY SYDNEY
runners.comment: Second-up. Comes off a 53-day let-up. First-up after three months 16th of 18 at Kyoto on May 16 over 1400m, 10 len behind Kishar with 53.0kg at $17.90. Previously second-up 11th of 14 at Hanshin on February 28 over 1800m, 21 len behind Realize Luminous carrying 52.0kg at $67.30. Solid top-three hope.

runners.name: BONCELLENSIS
runners.comment: Form hard to fault. Most recently made some head-way from midfield; 3rd of 11 at this track on June 16 over 1500m, 1.3 len behind Lupo with 56kg at $21. The start before that made some head-way from midfield; 2nd of 14 at this track on May 13 over 1500m, 3 len behind Canal Gale carrying 56kg at $74.50. Strong winning hope.

runners.name: SANEI TARO
runners.comment: Second run back. First-up after three months 3rd of 8 at Urawa on June 24 over 1500m, 2.25 len behind Tough Call with 57kg at $15.50. Previously second-up 9th of 11 at this track on January 1 over 1600m, 7 len behind Valentine Gift with 56kg at $18.80. Improver with winning prospects.

runners.name: CANAL REINA
runners.comment: At the latest run 5th of 11 at this track on June 16 over 1500m, 7 len behind Lupo with 54kg at $42.30. The run before that 5th of 12 at this track on May 12 over 1400m, 4 len behind Cardamom Roll with 54kg at $58.80. Prefer to watch at this stage.

runners.name: PURE CHROME
runners.comment: Third-up today. Resumes off a 38 day letup. First-up 6th of 16 at Nakayama Dirt on April 19 over 1200m, 8 len behind Sonic Breaker with 57.0kg at $122.20. Second-up 9th of 16 at Tokyo Dirt on May 31 over 1400m, 7 len behind Twilight View with 57.0kg at $29.60. Capable of a strong showing.

runners.name: KAMIKAKUSHI

runners.name: FOR MY DEAR
runners.comment: Most recently 6th of 8 at this track on June 17 over 1500m, 10 len behind Canal Gale carrying 54kg at $74.80. The run before that 6th of 11 at Funabashi on June 1 over 1200m, 6 len behind Salire Cima carrying 55kg at $10.70. Will need to improve many lengths to feature.

GOLDSTAR GRACE can find the frame without surprising.

runners.name: REDEEMER'S WAY

runners.name: GRANDIOSE GIRL
runners.comment: Last start finished last over 390m at this track beaten 8 lengths (22.61) behind Ace Diva in a Grade 4/5 on July 3. Last couple have been below par. Deserves another chance.

runners.name: DRINK MOJITOS
runners.comment: Has been out of the money of late. Could only manage fifth last time out over 352m at this track. Likely to find this a bit tough.

runners.name: GOLDSTAR GRACE
runners.comment: At the last outing finished 4th over 300m at Q Straight beaten 3.5 lengths (17.05) behind Cake Is Yummy in a P5 on July 6. Looks a solid hope.

runners.name: TUTA SUN
runners.comment: Was out of placings last time (20.40) at this track in a Grade 5, finishing seventh and beaten 5.5 lengths. Yet to win but has placed three times from this draw. Looking to others.

runners.name: BELLA LUNA
runners.comment: Has finished sixth at her last couple of starts, most recently at this track over 352m. Solid claims this line-up.

Will enjoy a nice run from this favourable starting position and rates a leading hope in a similar race. 5. SHEREACTS won at this venue two runs ago before a less impressive effort at her latest appearance over 1660m at Albion Park, beaten 20 metres. Primary contender if anywhere near her best. 2. LENNY LINCOLN is better than his last-start eighth over 1780m here. Can bounce back from the favourable draw. 6. ZAC DANIELS cannot be left out after solid recent performances, the latest a sound fourth at Albion Park over 1660m. One for the multiples.

Better than last start and deserves another chance.

This looks a nice assignment so watch for a better run.

G:TRE:10:2026-07-08.comment: 8. MY DINOSAUR was big odds last time but gave a huge sight after a fast early split, grabbed late but holding on to a placing when a 6 length second (17.58) over 300m at this track. TAP OUT GRACIE has mixed form recently, finishing eighth (18.57) in a Grade 5 at this track latest but did run well two back when in the frame. Well placed here and can atone this time. 2. MUSTANG SALLY is worth forgiving for her last effort when fifth (17.77) at this track over 300m. Comes through a solid form race last start. Has ability and a bold showing is expected. 7. runners.comment: Last start finished 5th in a Grade 5 on June 24 over 300m at this track behind My Julia beaten 4.5 lengths (17.77). Rates highly and looks tough to beat.

runners.comment: Was out of placings last time (25.01) at this track in a Bottom Up - Grade 5, finishing sixth and beaten 10 lengths. Still a maiden from the draw but has placed seven times. Looks one of the chances.

runners.comment: Last start finished fourth on July 4 over 400m at Geelong behind Paw Ingrid, beaten 6 lengths (23.31) in a Grade 5. Looks a solid hope.

runners.comment: Has not shown much in recent runs. Could only manage seventh last time out over 425m at this track. Will need to improve to feature.

runners.name: BULLAPARK BENO
runners.comment: Didn't do much last time out, 6th (Fr2) over 2150m at Bendigo, beaten 25 m by Kyvalley Michael (2:39.20) on July 1 at $7.50. Before that was well back in the run when 7th (Fr5) over 2240m at Melton beaten 45 m by With Aplomb (2:46.70) on June 20 at $81.

R:BEL:7:2026-07-08.comment: 3. PARTAY after having placed second two runs back when fresh-up from a spell scored an easy all-the-way win as the warm favourite last time over 1400m at Pinjarra Scarpside. Has William Pike again in the saddle and will be well supported to go back-to-back. 4. SHIMONOSEKI came from 11th of 12 into the turn to score by a nose over 1600m at Northam last time out, Shaun O'Donnell who has two wins when partnering stays on. ROMANTIC RULER just missed last time out when finishing a close fourth of 11 over 1400m at this track after he raced on the speed into the turn. Racing over 300m more in distance should be fighting out the finish. 2. SHOWLAS is better than her last start run when finishing sixth of seven over 1200m would suggest. Include in combinations.

runners.comment: Was out of placings last time (20.30) at this track in a Grade 5, finishing seventh and beaten 9 lengths. Yet to win but has placed three times from this draw. Has ability and should be around the money.

runners.name: WISE RICO
runners.comment: Has been out of the money of late. Could only manage sixth last time out over 352m at this track. Hard to envisage a win.

Hard to knock winning form and with even luck can land the hat trick. 10. SMOOTH BUCKAROO has been racing well, filling a top-three position at his last five starts here including a win from this row. Came from this barrier to miss narrowly last week. Big chance to atone. 7. JUST KEEP CHIMING is a progressive filly who has yet to miss the top-three including a tough last-start win by 1.4 metres at this circuit and distance after racing three wide without cover. 4. WOKKA ROCK hasn't been far away from wider draws at his last couple. Go well.

R:KAW:6:2026-07-08.comment: 4. GRAND WORLD was prominent on straightening then faded to finish eighth last time out over 1900m at Kyoto Dirt. Meets an inferior line-up and is the one to beat. 8. SANEI TARO doesn't win out of turn but ran a strong race when resuming from a spell last time out over 1500m at Urawa, finishing third and beaten 2.25 lengths after being in the firing line on the turn. Well placed and there is no reason he cannot find winning ways. 9. BONCELLENSIS has been racing well and is close to a win, the latest effort a solid third at this track over 1500m. Niihara Shuma has registered two minor placings when on board. One of the contenders. 3. PURE CHROME has been safely held at his last two starts, the latest when ninth over 1400m at Tokyo Dirt. Does enjoy some weight relief this time. Out of his depth in JRA meets recently but can easily bounce back.

runners.name: GRAND WORLD
runners.comment: Comes off a 38 day let-up. Last start couldn't go on with it; 8th of 16 at Kyoto Dirt on May 31 over 1900m, 8 len behind Snark Sharaku with 55.0kg at $3.60. The race before that held ground to the line 2nd of 13 at Kyoto Dirt on May 24 over 1900m, 1.0 len behind Piena Black carrying 55.0kg at $2.60. Leading contender coming out of a very nice stall.

runners.name: KASTANIE
runners.comment: Comes off a 38 day let-up. Last start 8th of 16 at Tokyo Dirt on May 31 over 1600m, 9 len behind Efcharisto with 55.0kg at $235.20. The run before that 10th of 16 at Nakayama Dirt on April 11 over 1800m, 22 len behind Ascot Vert carrying 52.0kg at $125.30. Will be doing best work late.

runners.name: KAZUYA
runners.comment: Second run back. First-up after four months ran second last of 8 at this track on June 17 over 1500m, 11 len behind Canal Gale with 56kg at $5. Previously second-up ran on from midfield; 3rd of 11 at this track on January 1 over 1600m, 0.8 len behind Valentine Gift with 56kg at $4.40. Don't underestimate.

runners.name: MY SYDNEY
runners.comment: Second-up. Comes off a 53-day let-up. First-up after three months 16th of 18 at Kyoto on May 16 over 1400m, 10 len behind Kishar with 53.0kg at $17.90. Previously second-up 11th of 14 at Hanshin on February 28 over 1800m, 21 len behind Realize Luminous carrying 52.0kg at $67.30. Solid top-three hope.

runners.name: BONCELLENSIS
runners.comment: Form hard to fault. Most recently made some head-way from midfield; 3rd of 11 at this track on June 16 over 1500m, 1.3 len behind Lupo with 56kg at $21. The start before that made some head-way from midfield; 2nd of 14 at this track on May 13 over 1500m, 3 len behind Canal Gale carrying 56kg at $74.50. Strong winning hope.

runners.name: SANEI TARO
runners.comment: Second run back. First-up after three months 3rd of 8 at Urawa on June 24 over 1500m, 2.25 len behind Tough Call with 57kg at $15.50. Previously second-up 9th of 11 at this track on January 1 over 1600m, 7 len behind Valentine Gift with 56kg at $18.80. Improver with winning prospects.

runners.name: CANAL REINA

runners.name: PURE CHROME
runners.comment: Third-up today. Resumes off a 38 day letup. First-up 6th of 16 at Nakayama Dirt on April 19 over 1200m, 8 len behind Sonic Breaker with 57.0kg at $122.20. Second-up 9th of 16 at Tokyo Dirt on May 31 over 1400m, 7 len behind Twilight View with 57.0kg at $29.60. Capable of a strong showing.

runners.name: KAMIKAKUSHI
runners.comment: Third race start. First start 9th of 16 at Chukyo Dirt on March 29 over 1400m, 13 len behind Lever Du Soleil with 55.0kg at $112.50. Returned from break 11th of 16 at Tokyo Dirt on June 6 over 1400m, 14 len behind Raise Tempest carrying 55.0kg at $21.20. Should progress from that first-up run.

runners.name: FOR MY DEAR
runners.comment: Most recently 6th of 8 at this track on June 17 over 1500m, 10 len behind Canal Gale carrying 54kg at $74.80. The run before that 6th of 11 at Funabashi on June 1 over 1200m, 6 len behind Salire Cima carrying 55kg at $10.70. Will need to improve many lengths to feature.

runners.name: AWAKE THIRD
runners.comment: Third-up today. First-up 5th of 11 at Urawa on May 28 over 2000m, 13 len behind Esprit Akirasan carrying 56kg at $27. Last start got back early 6th of 8 at Urawa on June 22 over 2000m, 6 len behind Sadamu Mont Blanc carrying 57kg at $30.20. Draws the inside but looks tested.

G:QLE:10:2026-07-08.comment: 6. ATOMIC SPIDER turned in a plain effort last time when sixth at this track over 352m behind Little House (20.23) in a Grade 5. Can bounce back. 2. GOLDSTAR GRACE can find the frame without surprising.

runners.name: GRANDIOSE GIRL
runners.comment: Last start finished last over 390m at this track beaten 8 lengths (22.61) behind Ace Diva in a Grade 4/5 on July 3. Last couple have been below par. Deserves another chance.

runners.name: DRINK MOJITOS
runners.comment: Has been out of the money of late. Could only manage fifth last time out over 352m at this track. Likely to find this a bit tough.

runners.name: GOLDSTAR GRACE
runners.comment: At the last outing finished 4th over 300m at Q Straight beaten 3.5 lengths (17.05) behind Cake Is Yummy in a P5 on July 6. Looks a solid hope.

runners.comment: Was out of placings last time (20.40) at this track in a Grade 5, finishing seventh and beaten 5.5 lengths. Yet to win but has placed three times from this draw. Looking to others.

runners.name: BELLA LUNA
runners.comment: Has finished sixth at her last couple of starts, most recently at this track over 352m. Solid claims this line-up.

H:RED:2:2026-07-08.comment: 1. PLAYFUL MISS finished fourth last time out, beaten 6 metres, in a nice return to form at this track over 1780m. Will enjoy a nice run from this favourable starting position and rates a leading hope in a similar race. 5. SHEREACTS won at this venue two runs ago before a less impressive effort at her latest appearance over 1660m at Albion Park, beaten 20 metres. Primary contender if anywhere near her best. 2. LENNY LINCOLN is better than his last-start eighth over 1780m here. Can bounce back from the favourable draw. 6. ZAC DANIELS cannot be left out after solid recent performances, the latest a sound fourth at Albion Park over 1660m. One for the multiples.

runners.name: SHEREACTS
runners.comment: Gave plenty of ground last start when eighth after showing early speed, behind Keayang Moscato at Albion Park over 1660m in a 3yo+ on June 19 at $41. Raced better the start before that where she won by 1.75 m as favourite (Sr3) at this track (2:09.80) beating Heza Maywyn in 3yo+ on June 12 at $3.20. Better than last start and deserves another chance.

runners.name: PLAYFUL MISS
runners.comment: Last start 4th (Sr3) over 1780m at this track beaten 6 m by Bolzano (2:10.40) in 3yo+ on July 1 at $10. This looks a nice assignment so watch for a better run.

runners.name: LENNY LINCOLN
runners.comment: Last start 8th (Sr3) over 1780m at this track beaten 16 m by Little Surfer Girl (2:09.20) in 3yo+ on July 1 at $15. At his previous start 7th (Fr4) over 1780m at this track, beaten 4 m by Barrett (2:09.00) in 3yo+ on June 3 at $23. Better than the latest run and from a low draw gets his chance to bounce back.

runners.name: ZAC DANIELS
runners.comment: Last start 4th (Fr5) over 1660m after racing wide at Albion Park, beaten 9 m by Merry Jewel (1:58.60) in 3yo+ on June 22 at $2.80. Before that, a game effort when 2nd (Fr5) over 1780m after being wide early at this track beaten 3.5 m by Vinnie Nitro (2:09.50) in 3yo+ on June 17 at $5.50. Sure to be thereabouts.

runners.name: ROCK IT BABY

At his previous start 4th (Sr2) over 1780m after being wide early at this track, beaten 5 m by Jaccka Cooper (2:09.60) in 3yo+ on June 17 at $31. Has ability and can do much better.

runners.name: BART BENTLEY
runners.comment: Last start was driven from back in the field when 6th (Fr5) over 1780m after being wide early at this track beaten 11 m by Bolzano (2:10.40) in 3yo+ on July 1 at $10. Two runs back 9th (Fr2) over 1780m at this track, beaten 30 m by Sir Richard Lee (2:07.60) on November 12 at $31. Strips fitter and can improve enough to play a big role.

runners.comment: Resumes. At the latest first-up run 7th (Sr1) over 1660m at Albion Park, beaten 15 m by Rock Supreme (1:57.50) on April 11 2025 at $31. Recent trials will help bring him on but a lack of race-fitness might work against.

G:TRE:10:2026-07-08.comment: 8. MY DINOSAUR was big odds last time but gave a huge sight after a fast early split, grabbed late but holding on to a placing when a 6 length second (17.58) over 300m at this track. Has performed well from this box with a win and two minor placings to his name from four starts. Sure to be about the mark. 4. TAP OUT GRACIE has mixed form recently, finishing eighth (18.57) in a Grade 5 at this track latest but did run well two back when in the frame. Well placed here and can atone this time. 2. MUSTANG SALLY is worth forgiving for her last effort when fifth (17.77) at this track over 300m. Comes through a solid form race last start. Has ability and a bold showing is expected. 7. LACEY RED warrants respect with the drop in trip.

runners.name: MY DINOSAUR
runners.comment: Hit the frame latest (17.58) when second at this track in a Grade 5. Goes very well from the draw boasting one victory and two places from four starts. With a clean break looks hard to beat.

runners.name: MUSTANG SALLY
runners.comment: Last start finished 5th in a Grade 5 on June 24 over 300m at this track behind My Julia beaten 4.5 lengths (17.77). Rates highly and looks tough to beat.

runners.comment: Has finished fourth at this circuit at the last two appearances, most recently when beaten 7 lengths behind In Your Head over 300m. Has claims on best form.

runners.name: LACEY RED
runners.comment: Last start finished fourth in a Grade 5 on July 4 over 400m at The Gardens behind Modest Man, beaten 12 lengths (23.61). Will find this a little easier. Looks a solid contender.

runners.name: TAP OUT GRACIE
runners.comment: Latest effort finished last in a Grade 5 on June 27 over 300m at this track behind My Dinosaur beaten 16 lengths (18.57). Tipped to improve sharply. Rates highly on best form.

runners.name: BLUE WIGGLE
runners.comment: Hasn't shown anything recently, all starting at big odds. Cannot enthuse on this occasion.

runners.comment: Backs up after finishing 7th on July 4 over 300m at this track in a Grade 4. Can't recommend in this field.

runners.name: PIZZA THIEF
runners.comment: Returns from a 12 weeks spell after being tipped out on the back of a seventh (31.13) over 520m at Nowra. Others are better placed.

runners.comment: Was out of placings last time (25.01) at this track in a Bottom Up - Grade 5, finishing sixth and beaten 10 lengths. Still a maiden from the draw but has placed seven times. Looks one of the chances.

runners.name: JOHN BOY
runners.comment: Last start finished fourth on July 4 over 400m at Geelong behind Paw Ingrid, beaten 6 lengths (23.31) in a Grade 5. Looks a solid hope.

runners.name: LIKE A BLAZE
runners.comment: Last start finished seventh on July 6 over 390m at Warrnambool behind Paw Enna, beaten 6 lengths (22.93) in a Bottom Up - Grade 5. Others read better.

runners.name: CHAIN DRIVE
runners.comment: Good performance to win by 3 lengths at this track over 425m (24.50) beating Dernancourt in Bottom Up - Grade 5 on July 1. Has hit winning form and can go on with it.

runners.name: BEAST POWER
runners.comment: Has not shown much in recent runs. Could only manage seventh last time out over 425m at this track. Will need to improve to feature.

runners.name: SUPER SEALANT
runners.comment: Showed good improvement when second behind Jazz Hands at Healesville last start over 350m (20.09). Likely to play a major role.

runners.name: BABY GANG

runners.name: FUTO FUKUTSU

runners.name: T O BERRY

runners.name: PIKANCHI CHERRY
runners.comment: First-starter by Mischevious Alex out of Swan Song. Betting the best guide.

runners.name: AFLEET LYDIA

runners.name: KAZOKUNO AI

runners.name: KOBASHIRIDESU
runners.comment: Two-year-old filly by Shanghai Bobby out of Malibu Beach having her first start. Profiles nicely for this.

Came from this barrier for second at Melton two starts back then had a 20m handicap at her latest appearance at Maryborough but worked to the front and then stuck on, beaten 3.7 metres into third. Draws for a nice run and could break through. 8. ALDEBARAN SUSANNE has switched yards since galloping out when resuming at Menangle. No harm in drawing here with the sprint lane to rely upon. Has the ability if she gets it right. 4. OFF YOUR FACESKI backs up off a sixth at Melton on Saturday. Led from only spot lower than this when scoring easily at Geelong prior. Contender. 1. MAJESTIC TOOTH owns a good record at this circuit and should get her chance from the ace draw.

Then a handy effort when beaten by 3.5 m finishing third behind Fremarks Peggy at Maryborough over 2190m on June 29 at $5.50. Deserves a win and gets her chance from this draw.

runners.name: ALDEBARAN SUSANNE
runners.comment: Galloped out first-up beaten 30 m ninth behind Titan Stride at Menangle over 1609m in a on June 16. Fitter and is a major player with manners.

runners.name: TRIPOD

runners.name: BULLAPARK BENO
runners.comment: Didn't do much last time out, 6th (Fr2) over 2150m at Bendigo, beaten 25 m by Kyvalley Michael (2:39.20) on July 1 at $7.50. Before that was well back in the run when 7th (Fr5) over 2240m at Melton beaten 45 m by With Aplomb (2:46.70) on June 20 at $81.

R:BEL:7:2026-07-08.comment: 3. PARTAY after having placed second two runs back when fresh-up from a spell scored an easy all-the-way win as the warm favourite last time over 1400m at Pinjarra Scarpside. Has William Pike again in the saddle and will be well supported to go back-to-back. 4. SHIMONOSEKI came from 11th of 12 into the turn to score by a nose over 1600m at Northam last time out, Shaun O'Donnell who has two wins when partnering stays on. Well placed and jumping from a handy draw should be in the finish. 1. ROMANTIC RULER just missed last time out when finishing a close fourth of 11 over 1400m at this track after he raced on the speed into the turn. Racing over 300m more in distance should be fighting out the finish. 2. SHOWLAS is better than her last start run when finishing sixth of seven over 1200m would suggest. Include in combinations.

runners.comment: Third-up today. Resuming settled towards the rear 2nd of 12 at this track Mdn on June 10 over 1300m, on a slow track; head behind Western Jet carrying 58kg at $3.60. Second-up favourite; won by 5 len at Pinjarra Scarpside Mdn June 24 over 1400m defeating Rocking In Vegas carrying 58kg at $1.75. Form out of his last win has been franked and he can go on with the job.

runners.name: SHIMONOSEKI

Most recently favourite; was well back until straightening; raced back then made ground from the turn; won by a nose at Northam Cl3 June 25 over 1600m defeating Old Mate Henry with 56.5kg at $2.90. The run before that made ground from midfield; 3rd of 12 at this track 0Mwly on June 10 over 1700m, 6 len behind Tiff's Lad carrying 55kg at $3.20. runners.comment: Most recently 5th of 11 at Pinjarra Cl3 on July 2 over 1400m, on a slow track; 1.1 len behind Bannered with 56kg at $6.50. SWEET LEGS turned in a better run last time to find a minor placing (16.81) at Q Straight behind Zabdon No Doubt in a Grade 5. Hard to beat again. 2. NO COVER wasn't far away at the finish when 5th and beaten only 4.5 lengths (20.19) at this track. Worth another chance. 7. SOLAR FLARE is worth including after a top-three finish most recently.

runners.name: SWEET LEGS
runners.comment: Latest effort finished 2nd over 300m at Q Straight beaten 0.8 lengths (16.81) behind Zabdon No Doubt in a Grade 5 on June 29. Boxed on well to finish runner-up last time. Leading player.

runners.name: NOAKI STAR
runners.comment: Missed the frame last time but was in the minors two on end prior to that, the most recent when second (19.92) over 352m at this track. Has to overcome a wide draw and appears tested on latest effort.

runners.name: NO COVER
runners.comment: Latest effort finished 5th over 352m at this track beaten 4.5 lengths (20.19) behind Golden Legs in a P5 on June 24. Looks well placed and should prove hard to beat.

runners.name: SOLAR FLARE
runners.comment: Flew the lids with a fast early split last time, hitting the frame with a 2 length third (19.81) over 352m at this track and making it two placings on end. Capable of a good showing.

runners.name: GOLDSTAR CHANEL
runners.comment: Was out of placings last time (20.30) at this track in a Grade 5, finishing seventh and beaten 9 lengths. Yet to win but has placed three times from this draw. Has ability and should be around the money.

runners.name: VELOCITY COMMIT
runners.comment: Latest effort finished 7th in a Grade 4/5 on July 1 over 352m at this track behind Whispering Mist beaten 9 lengths (20.27). Better than the last couple of runs suggest. Expected to do much better.

runners.name: IT'S AN ACE
runners.comment: Could only manage sixth last time but the start prior hit the frame when second (19.22) over 350m at Q Straight. Has a wide draw to navigate but is worth plenty of thought.

runners.name: WISE RICO
runners.comment: Has been out of the money of late. Could only manage sixth last time out over 352m at this track. Hard to envisage a win.

H:BAT:4:2026-07-08.comment: 11. COWBOY CULTURE made it two in a row at this circuit and distance when he came from a similar draw and got the cash by 2.5 metres last time out. Hard to knock winning form and with even luck can land the hat trick. 10. SMOOTH BUCKAROO has been racing well, filling a top-three position at his last five starts here including a win from this row. Came from this barrier to miss narrowly last week. Big chance to atone. 7. JUST KEEP CHIMING is a progressive filly who has yet to miss the top-three including a tough last-start win by 1.4 metres at this circuit and distance after racing three wide without cover. 4. WOKKA ROCK hasn't been far away from wider draws at his last couple. Go well.

runners.name: COWBOY CULTURE
runners.comment: Three-year-old colt is racing in fine form. Won his last two outings at this track both over 1730m. Last start came from midfield and won by 2.25 m (Sr2) at this track (2:05.90) beating Smooth Buckaroo in 3yo on June 24 at $3.60 at the bell was 2nd-2.61. Big chance to land the hat trick.

runners.name: SMOOTH BUCKAROO
runners.comment: Not far away at the last couple starts; Finished a narrow second behind Studleigh Fury at this track over 1730m 3yo GH last start. Before that was beaten 2.25 metres second again at this track in 3yo on June 24. Can continue the strong form.

runners.name: WIT WICKEE
runners.comment: Finished up last campaign with a win at Parkes, started this campaign was well back in the run when 7th (Fr7) over 1730m after racing wide at this track, at the bell was 8th-13.06 beaten 13 m by Cowboy Culture (2:05.90) in 3yo on June 24 at $8.50. Then last time 5th (Fr6) over 1730m after showing early pace at this track, at the bell was 2nd-1.81 beaten 12 m by Studleigh Fury (2:03.90) in 3yo GH on July 1 at $12. Drawn close to the inside and will be fitter so consider.

runners.name: JUST KEEP CHIMING
runners.comment: Hard to fault of late. Last start won by 1.4 m (Sr2) at this track (2:06.70) beating Syds Joy in 3yo on June 24 at $4.20 at the bell was leading 0.96. Progressing well and is among the chances.

runners.name: XCALIBUR
runners.comment: Won three starts back at Dubbo over 1720m 3yo on May 22. Last start 6th (Sr3) over 1720m at Penrith beaten 22 m by Lochinvar Marcello (2:05.50) in 3yo on June 25 at $18. Could improve sharply.

runners.name: WOKKA ROCK
runners.comment: Last start 4th (Fr5) over 1730m after showing early pace at this track, at the bell was leading 1.81 beaten 9 m by Studleigh Fury (2:03.90) in 3yo GH on July 1 at $4.20. At his previous start game effort when 3rd (Fr5) over 1730m after showing early speed at this track was 3rd-3.16 at the bell, beaten 6 m by Cowboy Culture (2:05.90) in 3yo on June 24 at $4. Forward performance expected.

runners.name: CHEVAL JULIA
runners.comment: Last start was driven from back in the field when 5th (Fr7) over 1730m at this track was 8th-14.89 at the bell, beaten 14 m by Cheval Tiger (2:05.50) in M on July 1 at $9. Two runs back 5th (Fr5) over 1730m at this track was 7th-12.42 at the bell, beaten 6 m by Just Keep Chiming (2:06.70) in 3yo on June 24 at $3.50. Long win drought set to continue.

runners.name: SYDS JOY
runners.comment: Last start 6th (Fr8) over 1730m after being wide early at this track was 4th-7.72 at the bell, beaten 14 m by Cheval Tiger (2:05.50) in M on July 1 at $13. Two runs back 2nd (Fr7) over 1730m at this track, at the bell was 5th-7.78 beaten 1.4 m by Just Keep Chiming (2:06.70) in 3yo on June 24 at $17. Needs to do more. Facing a tough assignment this time around.

runners.name: CHEVAL TIGER
runners.comment: Last start tracked on the speed and boxed on steadily; won by a neck as favourite after showing early speed, (Fr1) at this track (2:05.50) beating Stay Lucky in M on July 1 at $2.70 at the bell was 3rd-5.38. Tougher task here.

runners.name: HEARTOF KINGSCLAIR
runners.comment: Well beaten last start by Cheval Tiger, who she meets again; when 20 metres tenth at this track over 1730m in a M race on July 1. Will need improvement to figure.

runners.name: STAY LUCKY
runners.comment: Last start good run when 2nd (Sr2) over 1730m at this track was 7th-13.65 at the bell, beaten a neck by Cheval Tiger (2:05.50) in M on July 1 at $7.50. Two runs back won by 1.2 m as favourite when quickly away, (Fr2) at Parkes (2:01.90) beating My Ultimate Bruno in on June 21 at $2.10 at the bell was leading 1.2. Decent effort last start. First four chance again.

R:KAW:6:2026-07-08.comment: 4. GRAND WORLD was prominent on straightening then faded to finish eighth last time out over 1900m at Kyoto Dirt. Meets an inferior line-up and is the one to beat. 8. SANEI TARO doesn't win out of turn but ran a strong race when resuming from a spell last time out over 1500m at Urawa, finishing third and beaten 2.25 lengths after being in the firing line on the turn. Well placed and there is no reason he cannot find winning ways. 9. BONCELLENSIS has been racing well and is close to a win, the latest effort a solid third at this track over 1500m. Niihara Shuma has registered two minor placings when on board. One of the contenders. 3. PURE CHROME has been safely held at his last two starts, the latest when ninth over 1400m at Tokyo Dirt. Does enjoy some weight relief this time. Out of his depth in JRA meets recently but can easily bounce back.

runners.name: GRAND WORLD
runners.comment: Comes off a 38 day let-up. Last start couldn't go on with it; 8th of 16 at Kyoto Dirt on May 31 over 1900m, 8 len behind Snark Sharaku with 55.0kg at $3.60. The race before that held ground to the line 2nd of 13 at Kyoto Dirt on May 24 over 1900m, 1.0 len behind Piena Black carrying 55.0kg at $2.60. Leading contender coming out of a very nice stall.

runners.name: KASTANIE
runners.comment: Comes off a 38 day let-up. Last start 8th of 16 at Tokyo Dirt on May 31 over 1600m, 9 len behind Efcharisto with 55.0kg at $235.20. The run before that 10th of 16 at Nakayama Dirt on April 11 over 1800m, 22 len behind Ascot Vert carrying 52.0kg at $125.30. Will be doing best work late.

runners.name: KAZUYA
runners.comment: Second run back. First-up after four months ran second last of 8 at this track on June 17 over 1500m, 11 len behind Canal Gale with 56kg at $5. Previously second-up ran on from midfield; 3rd of 11 at this track on January 1 over 1600m, 0.8 len behind Valentine Gift with 56kg at $4.40. Don't underestimate.

runners.name: MY SYDNEY
runners.comment: Second-up. Comes off a 53-day let-up. First-up after three months 16th of 18 at Kyoto on May 16 over 1400m, 10 len behind Kishar with 53.0kg at $17.90. Previously second-up 11th of 14 at Hanshin on February 28 over 1800m, 21 len behind Realize Luminous carrying 52.0kg at $67.30. Solid top-three hope.

runners.name: BONCELLENSIS
runners.comment: Form hard to fault. Most recently made some head-way from midfield; 3rd of 11 at this track on June 16 over 1500m, 1.3 len behind Lupo with 56kg at $21. The start before that made some head-way from midfield; 2nd of 14 at this track on May 13 over 1500m, 3 len behind Canal Gale carrying 56kg at $74.50. Strong winning hope.

runners.name: SANEI TARO
runners.comment: Second run back. First-up after three months 3rd of 8 at Urawa on June 24 over 1500m, 2.25 len behind Tough Call with 57kg at $15.50. Previously second-up 9th of 11 at this track on January 1 over 1600m, 7 len behind Valentine Gift with 56kg at $18.80. Improver with winning prospects.

runners.name: CANAL REINA
runners.comment: At the latest run 5th of 11 at this track on June 16 over 1500m, 7 len behind Lupo with 54kg at $42.30. The run before that 5th of 12 at this track on May 12 over 1400m, 4 len behind Cardamom Roll with 54kg at $58.80. Prefer to watch at this stage.

runners.name: PURE CHROME
runners.comment: Third-up today. Resumes off a 38 day letup. First-up 6th of 16 at Nakayama Dirt on April 19 over 1200m, 8 len behind Sonic Breaker with 57.0kg at $122.20. Second-up 9th of 16 at Tokyo Dirt on May 31 over 1400m, 7 len behind Twilight View with 57.0kg at $29.60. Capable of a strong showing.

runners.name: KAMIKAKUSHI
runners.comment: Third race start. First start 9th of 16 at Chukyo Dirt on March 29 over 1400m, 13 len behind Lever Du Soleil with 55.0kg at $112.50. Returned from break 11th of 16 at Tokyo Dirt on June 6 over 1400m, 14 len behind Raise Tempest carrying 55.0kg at $21.20. Should progress from that first-up run.

runners.name: FOR MY DEAR
runners.comment: Most recently 6th of 8 at this track on June 17 over 1500m, 10 len behind Canal Gale carrying 54kg at $74.80. The run before that 6th of 11 at Funabashi on June 1 over 1200m, 6 len behind Salire Cima carrying 55kg at $10.70. Will need to improve many lengths to feature.

runners.name: AWAKE THIRD
runners.comment: Third-up today. First-up 5th of 11 at Urawa on May 28 over 2000m, 13 len behind Esprit Akirasan carrying 56kg at $27. Last start got back early 6th of 8 at Urawa on June 22 over 2000m, 6 len behind Sadamu Mont Blanc carrying 57kg at $30.20. Draws the inside but looks tested.
